caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a traditional-style shirt adorned with eagle motifs and colorful stripes. He stands behind a podium, speaking into a microphone. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background. The man is holding a piece of paper or a small booklet, which he occasionally refers to as he speaks. His expression is serious and focused, suggesting that he is delivering an important message or speech. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the organization or event associated with the video. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems attentive to his words.
